name: logistics carriers processing 50–100 deliveries/month tool
description: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 deliveries/month, manual report generation causes late compliance submissions. We automate compliance reporting instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in generating timely compliance reports from raw data.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in generating timely compliance reports from raw data.
